prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot mockup of a Chinese short-video livestream shopping interface in dark mode, shown on a charcoal black app background. At the top right of the overall canvas, place a rounded dark chat bubble containing the Chinese text 帮我生成一张马斯克在带货老干妈的抖音直播间截图, with 2 small interface icons to its right for copy and edit. In the lower left area, display a tall iPhone-style livestream screen with a black bezel, rounded corners, and the time 20:30. The livestream is from Lao Gan Ma’s official flagship store, with a Chinese profile name line, a blue verification badge, a red follow button, and a top status row showing 3 circular avatars, a viewer count of 10万+, a close icon, and a button labeled 更多直播. Add ranking text near the top such as 带货总榜第1名 and 人气第1名. The main video shows Elon Musk in a dim warm studio resembling a premium product livestream set, wearing a black shirt, holding a large jar of Lao Gan Ma chili sauce in his right hand and pointing at it with his left hand. His face is intentionally blurred with a rectangular mosaic blur. Behind him, include a glowing red-orange neon sign reading 老干妈 / LAO GAN MA / 国民辣酱, shelves with several sauce jars, a framed portrait logo, and a dark leafy plant on the right. Overlay typical livestream UI elements: on the left side, 2 floating gift/comment callouts with usernames and counts x66 and x88; below them a purple pill showing 35 and 加入了直播间. Add a scrolling comment area with 5 visible chat lines, including Chinese usernames and one line from Elon Musk saying in English, "It's awesome! Very delicious!" followed by a Chinese line meaning he buys it every day. At the upper right of the video area, add a pink-red promo banner mentioning 抖音618好物节 and 618元消费券. In the lower right, place a product card with a hot-sale label 热卖x9999+, showing 3 jars of Lao Gan Ma and a bowl of chili condiment, product title text for 老干妈 风味豆豉油辣椒 280g*3瓶, small guarantee tags, and a large price ¥39.9 with a red purchase button. At the bottom of the phone screen, include 5 navigation/action areas: an edit-style button on the left, a text input hint, a shopping cart icon, a heart/gift icon pair, and a share arrow icon. Overall style: ultra-realistic app screenshot, believable Chinese ecommerce livestream UI, high detail, cinematic warm lighting in the video feed, clean modern mobile interface, visually convincing social commerce capture.
